Ω : Type u_2

G : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
⊢ Measure.map (fun ω => (G ω)ᶜ) P = @SimpleGraph.binomialRandom V (unitInterval.symm p)
